name: Mexican Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large frying skillet.
2. Add rice, onion, and cilantro to the melted butter.
3. Fry the mixture until the rice turns golden brown.
4. Pour in water and salsa.
5. Bring the mixture to a full boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes or until all liquid is absorbed.
6. The resulting rice will be fluffy, not sticky.
7. For an added protein component, you may incorporate up to 1 pound of ground beef; serve with warm tortillas on the side.
